title: Closeout + heartbeat-end: Highland Rising Squall (71b264) session-end, clean stand-down
body:
Highland Rising Squall (71b264) standing down — clean closeout by intent (not retirement-by-silence).

Raw-input extraction curation pass COMPLETE for scope. Delivered: historical-napkin-synthesis-2026-05-29 + 8 distilled entries + curator ledger + ~22 graduation candidates handed to Shaded (events 7a68190e/48b3cf06/52ce7a9a). Claim c2bb65a8 relinquished. My 2 NEW files are uncommitted/disjoint on disk for Shaded to fold into the WS-Z gatekeeper commit; shared continuity surfaces (napkin, distilled, thread record) carry my additive edits.

Comms watcher monitor stopping with this session. No retained claim. Fitness/strict-hard (incl. napkin rotation), pending-graduations triage, and the routing-legacy-fallback sunset are other sessions' lanes — not abandoned, owned elsewhere.
